name: Year C — Nov 02, 2025 (Sun)

readings.citation:
Just as Jesus died and has risen again,
so through Jesus God will bring with him
those who have fallen asleep;
and as in Adam all die,
so also in Christ will all be brought to life.
Reading I | MULTIPLE OPTIONS - See Lectionary
readings.summary:
668. The Commemoration of All the Faithful Departed
(or those given in the Masses for the Dead, nos. 1011–1015)

antiphons.text:
Come, you who are blessed by my Father;
inherit the Kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option I | Cf. Jn 11:25–26
antiphons.text:
I am the Resurrection and the Life, says the Lord.
Whoever believes in me, even though he dies, will live, and
everyone who lives and believes in me will not die for ever.

planningNotes: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. 4 Esdr 2:35, 34

Let perpetual light shine upon them, O Lord,
with your Saints for ever, for you are merciful.

Communion Antiphon • Option III |  Cf. Phil 3:20–21
We await a savior, the Lord Jesus Christ,
who will change our mortal bodies,
to conform with his glorified body.
